title: DCP/PCP: Decode/Prefill Context Parallelism

key_concepts: Context Parallel shards the SEQUENCE axis (DCP shards KV cache across decode ranks; PCP shards prefill input across ranks)
DCP folds inside TP group (tp_size % dcp_size == 0; world_size unchanged); PCP is an independent axis (world_size = tp x pp x pcp x dp, NOT x dcp)
5D device mesh: external_dp x dp x pp x pcp x tp at parallel_state.py:L1569-L1575
DCP communication backends: AG+RS (default, 3 NCCL ops/layer) vs A2A (advanced, 2 NCCL ops/layer; arxiv.org/abs/2507.07120)
LSE-weighted combine: lse_max=max_i(lse_i); weight_i=exp(lse_i - lse_max); O_global = sum_i(weight_i * O_i) / sum_i(weight_i) (FlashAttention online softmax across ranks)
cp_kv_cache_interleave_size knob: striped (interleave=1) vs blocked striped (interleave=K) vs contiguous; block_size must be divisible by interleave_size
Striped sharding solves causal-mask LOAD imbalance, NOT communication pattern
max_memory_usage_bytes formula: cdiv(max_model_len, dcp x pcp) x cdiv(...,block_size) x page_size_bytes (kv_cache_interface.py:L195-L205)
vLLM ships NO class RingAttention / StripedAttention / ContextParallel / DecodeContextParallel / PrefillContextParallel; only BatchDCPPrefillWrapper at flashinfer.py:L213
summary.code_interface: _DCP / _PCP GroupCoordinator singletons in vllm/distributed/parallel_state.py; initialize_model_parallel(tp_size, pp_size, pcp_size, dcp_size) builds 5D mesh; AttentionImplBase.__new__ initializes dcp_world_size/dcp_rank/pcp_world_size/pcp_rank/total_cp_world_size=pcp*dcp/total_cp_rank=pcp_rank*dcp_world+dcp_rank; dcp_a2a_lse_reduce(out, lse, cp_group) -> combined_out; get_dcp_local_seq_lens(seq_lens, dcp_size, dcp_rank, cp_kv_cache_interleave_size) -> per-rank lengths
prerequisites_assumed: Ch03 attention mechanisms — LSE / softmax over partial outputs
Ch04 continuous batching — prefill vs decode phase distinction
Ch08 tensor parallelism — group construction in parallel_state.py, axis orthogonality, column/row parallel sharding
Ch09 expert parallelism — _EP GroupCoordinator pattern (mirrored by _DCP/_PCP); axis composition; flatten_tp_across_dp_and_pcp in fused_moe/config.py
summary.narrative_tone: 5-step rhythm per major section: open source -> ask why -> derive theory -> implement simplified -> diff vs vLLM. Theory is provably-equivalent LSE-weighted combine (FlashAttention online softmax across ranks); causal-mask load-balance math; 5D mesh axis composition.
summary.running_example_stage: world_size=16 with (tp=4, pp=2, pcp=2, dp=1) and dcp=2 folded inside TP — total 16 ranks, 4 TP-groups, 8 DCP sub-groups, 4 PCP groups. Long-context 128K sequence on 70B model (80 layers, 8 KV heads, head_dim=128, bf16) — KV cache = 33.5 GB per request without CP, 2.1 GB with (dcp=4, pcp=4).

reframes.claim: no class RingAttention / StripedAttention / ContextParallel / DecodeContextParallel / PrefillContextParallel in vLLM (5th instance after Ch07 radix-tree / Ch08 TensorParallel / Ch09 ExpertParallel / Ch10 MultiTokenPrediction)
reframes.evidence: grep -rE '^class\s+(RingAttention|StripedAttention|ContextParallel|DecodeContextParallel|PrefillContextParallel)' vllm/ returns 0 matches. Only BatchDCPPrefillWrapper at vllm/v1/attention/backends/flashinfer.py:L213 (flashinfer-specific helper). DCP/PCP machinery is module-level pure-function code (dcp_alltoall.py) + GroupCoordinator singletons (_DCP, _PCP in parallel_state.py:L1234,L1285) + per-attention-backend integration.

reframes.claim: outline says 'all-reduce vs all-to-all'; source uses 'AG+RS (AllGather+ReduceScatter) vs A2A (All-to-All)'
reframes.evidence: DCPCommBackend = Literal["ag_rs", "a2a"] at vllm/config/parallel.py:L322-L328. NOT all-reduce. Default is 'ag_rs' (3 NCCL ops/layer); advanced is 'a2a' (2 NCCL ops/layer).

reframes.claim: outline says '3D parallelism (CP+TP)'; source has 5D device mesh: external_dp x dp x pp x pcp x tp with DCP folded inside TP
reframes.evidence: vllm/distributed/parallel_state.py:L1569-L1575: all_ranks = torch.arange(world_size).reshape(-1, data_parallel_size, pipeline_model_parallel_size, prefill_context_model_parallel_size, tensor_model_parallel_size). DCP nested inside TP via L1601: group_ranks = all_ranks.reshape(-1, decode_context_model_parallel_size).unbind(0).

reframes.claim: DCP and PCP are SEPARABLE axes, not 'must match'
reframes.evidence: parallel.py:L474-L478 only enforces tp_size % dcp_size == 0; PCP has no such constraint. Production configs run (tp=8, dcp=2, pcp=4) — DCP=2 within each TP-group of 8, PCP=4 as independent axis multiplying world_size.

demos.title: HBM-per-rank capacity sweep under (DCP, PCP)
demos.trap_evidence: A — DCP/PCP wins HBM capacity, not throughput

demos.title: LSE-weighted combine equivalence (Ring Attention algebra)
core_numerics: max abs error vs single-process FlashAttention < 1e-6
demos.trap_evidence: F — vLLM uses LSE algebra, not P2P ring topology

demos.title: AG+RS vs A2A NCCL op count + alpha-beta bandwidth model
demos.trap_evidence: F — A2A is faster than AG+RS but neither is Ring

demos.title: Striped vs contiguous KV partitioning under causal mask
core_numerics: contiguous: rank-7 work=480 KV-attends, rank-0 work=32 (15x imbalance)
demos.trap_evidence: G — Striped is the LOAD-BALANCING scheme, NOT a communication pattern

demos.title: 5D mesh group construction (world_size=16, tp=4, pcp=2, pp=2, dp=1, dcp=2)
core_numerics: 8 DCP sub-groups (size 2 each, folded inside TP)
world_size = 4 x 2 x 2 x 1 = 16 (NOT x dcp)
demos.trap_evidence: D — DCP and PCP are SEPARABLE axes, not 'must match'

honest_caveats: Single-process simulation does NOT launch NCCL collectives. The math is verified bit-exact against single-process FlashAttention; real intra-node NVLink (200+ GB/s) and inter-node IB (50 GB/s) are not measured.
alpha-beta bandwidth values are H100 + 4xNVLink reference numbers; A100 + InfiniBand would shift beta by ~3-5x and alpha by ~2x. Production should measure on target hardware.

supports_pcp is not yet True for all attention backends — flash_attn V3 has explicit DCP support; PCP is still wiring up. Demo simulates PCP as if all backends support it; production hits NotImplementedError for some.
cp_kv_cache_interleave_size is the latest API; dcp_kv_cache_interleave_size is DEPRECATED (parallel.py:L315-L321 marks the deprecation). Demo uses the new name.
5D mesh demo uses external_dp=1 (default for non-verl integrations); verl deployments would use external_dp > 1.

language_traps_planned: A: DCP doubles decode throughput at dcp_size=2 — false; HBM capacity is the WIN axis; throughput is workload-dependent
B: PCP halves prefill latency at pcp_size=2 — partially true; depends on prefill length x bandwidth
C: Context parallel is just sequence parallel renamed — false; sequence parallel shards activations within TP for HBM, CP shards KV (DCP) or input sequence (PCP)
D: DCP and PCP must match — false; separable axes; tp%dcp==0 is the only hard constraint
E: Context parallel is the same as TP for the attention layer — false; TP shards heads, CP shards sequence; different code paths
F: Ring Attention is the canonical implementation in vLLM — false; vLLM ships AG+RS or A2A NCCL collectives, not P2P ring
G: Striped Attention is just renamed Ring Attention — false; striped is a TOKEN-PARTITIONING scheme (interleave_size knob), independent of communication pattern

knowledge_module.rationale: distinct from K (Ch07 prefix-cache), P (Ch06 scheduler / preemption), T (Ch08 tensor-parallelism), E (Ch09 expert-parallelism), M (Ch10 multi-token-prediction), W (wisdom) — per feedback_double_prefix_headings.md

changelog.change: Created Ch11 implementation skeleton; corrected reframes per brief §2.2 (no class RingAttention 5th instance + AG+RS vs A2A correction + 5D mesh not 3D + separable DCP/PCP axes); pinned source commit 98661fe; populated 12 source files (12+ floor per Ch10 cadence).

Test suite: 402/402 passed in 0.94s across 10 test files. All 7 traps (A-G) pinned. Demo §1-§5 numerics verbatim-pinned. ep ∈ {dcp_size 2,4,8} forward equivalence verified via LSE-combine round-trip. 5 framing tips for writer in test-report.md. D16-D20 appended to knowledge module. Verdict: APPROVED → handoff to writer.
